name: Mess (mame folder alias)

bios.notes: BIOS, firmware, keys, and machine ROMs are user-managed and must not be stored by rom-librarian.

notes: Do not rename, unzip, merge, split, or rebuild arcade sets without matching DAT/version context.
BIOS and firmware files are user-managed and must not be collected or stored by audits.
Disc/archive conversion should remain report-only unless a dedicated verified workflow exists.

Folder/platform alias for `mame` used by ES-DE, Batocera, EmuDeck, RetroBat, or related frontends. Arcade sets are version-sensitive. Do not unzip MAME ROM sets by default. CHDs often live in a subfolder named after the parent ROM.
